div.p: In despatch 155 of July 10, 1948, not printed, Joyce transmitted four copies of General Airey’s report on the administration of the United Kingdom-United States Zone of the Free Territory of Trieste for the period April 1–June 30. (860S.00/7–1048) The letter of transmission to the President of the Security Council dated August 6, and text of the report, document S/953, are printed in United Nations, Security Council: Official Records, Supplement for August 1948, pages 117–144.
